author.bio: Serving your sites over HTTPS+HTTP/2 automatically. On a mission to put every site on HTTPS! Visit our forum for help: http://caddy.community
author.name: Caddy Web Server

content.text: Caddy 0.10.12 released! Full support for @letsencrypt ACMEv2, automated wildcard certificates, HTTP-01 challenge in a cluster, and more! Available now. https://caddyserver.com/blog/caddy-0_10_12-released
content.html: Caddy 0.10.12 released! Full support for @letsencrypt ACMEv2, automated wildcard certificates, HTTP-01 challenge in a cluster, and more! Available now. https://caddyserver.com/blog/caddy-0_10_12-released
